scoring_model_policy.deterministic_gate2: The entire table is numeric: midpoints, misclassification counts, and the optimal threshold are all computed and verified in Python at Gate 2. No LLM scoring for this worksheet once the table is correctly extracted.
scoring_model_policy.claude-sonnet-4-6: Not used unless a verbal justification cell is present.

aicft_policy: This rubric produces a worksheet-level credit band only. It is NOT an AI-CFT level. AI-CFT level is cumulative and assigned at the portfolio level under researcher judgement. Per item, Gate 4 emits LO evidence (confirmed / weak / none); it never assigns a level from a single worksheet.
critical_extraction_note: WS10 requires filling a numeric TABLE (threshold candidates and misclassification counts). The sample student JSON contains verbal/conceptual explanations of the algorithm (B1-B8), not the actual table values. This indicates a fundamental extraction failure — OCR captured the wrong content. The correct items are numeric: candidate thresholds and their misclassification counts.

context.description: Given 7 energy values (28, 69, 219, 346, 359, 408, 489 kcal), compute midpoint thresholds and count misclassifications for each. Select optimal threshold.
context.optimal_threshold_reasoning: Threshold 6 (between 408 and 489, approximately 448.5) gives only 1 misclassification. Answer key shows optimal = 408.

credit_rules.full: Value is approximately the midpoint between 28 and 69 (acceptable range: 28-69).
credit_rules.partial: Value is in kcal range but not midpoint.

credit_rules.full: 408 kcal or a value in the range 383.5-448.5 (between 359-408 or 408-489 midpoints).
credit_rules.zero: A threshold with misclassification count > 2, or empty.

extraction_failure_protocol.detection: If gate_1 items for WS10 contain sentence-form text (not numbers), this indicates the OCR captured the wrong region of the page (header/instruction text instead of the table cells).
extraction_failure_protocol.action: Set gate_1 status to 'extraction_failure'. Set gate_2 status to 'blocked'. Set gate_3 status to 'blocked_by_extraction_failure'. Do NOT score conceptual text against the numeric rubric.
extraction_failure_protocol.remediation: Re-run OCR with explicit instruction to extract only table cell values. Alternatively, use vision model to locate and extract the table directly.

overall_scoring.full: All or most candidate thresholds computed correctly with consistent misclassification counts, and optimal threshold correctly identified.
overall_scoring.partial: Some threshold computations correct but optimal threshold wrong or missing.
overall_scoring.zero: No numeric values extracted or all values wrong.
